sourceRootLabel: AgenC WP-06 checklist, shared portal protocol contract, and sibling portal mobile view

requiredBehaviors.behavior: The shared portal protocol advertises portal.mobile.status.read and exposes a compact AgenCPortalMobileStatusSnapshot projection for phone check-ins without adding write-capable daemon methods.
edgeCases: The portal protocol version advances with the new public capability.
The mobile snapshot is built from an allowlist of fields instead of recursively filtering the desktop dashboard shape.
The core and sibling portal projection helpers match the shared WP-06 mobile status fixture.
The exported runtime barrel includes the mobile helper, background-agent dashboard state, and public mobile status types.

requiredBehaviors.behavior: The sibling portal renders a compact Mobile Check-In panel from the shared mobile status projection and advertises the portal.mobile.status.read capability during initialize.
edgeCases: The panel contains no buttons or forms and is therefore read-only.
The panel renders through textContent and keeps hostile daemon strings inert.
The small-screen CSS collapses the mobile check-in lists to one column.

requiredBehaviors.behavior: The mobile check-in omits desktop workspace and sensitive context fields while preserving enough status to inspect agent progress from a phone.
edgeCases: No cwd, auth identity, composer draft, message send state, transcript text, rollout path, source, or daemon error string is serialized.
Auth is reduced to an authenticated boolean and connection state is reduced to status plus initialized.
Agent and session rows expose only stable IDs, display titles/objectives, statuses, attention booleans, and updated timestamps.

requiredBehaviors.behavior: The mobile check-in sorts rows newest updatedAt first with stable ID tie-breaking, applies normalized limits, reports zero-filled status counts, includes background agents without duplicate IDs, and flags errored agents plus agents whose active session is waiting.
edgeCases: Non-finite limits fall back to the default page size.
Fractional limits are floored and negative limits clamp to zero.
generatedAt uses the explicit now option, then connectionState.updatedAt, then a deterministic epoch fallback.

requiredBehaviors.behavior: WP-06 verification runs the targeted portal protocol tests and fails if the mobile status contract, test file, parity file, or read-only capability markers disappear.
edgeCases: The WP-06 gate runs before the generic WP fallback.
A missing portal-mobile.contract.test.ts file fails verification before completion.
The gate verifies the capability/version pairing through the portal contract test.

intentionalReductions: WP-06 does not implement a hosted mobile app, push notifications, or a new daemon endpoint. It provides the dependency-light read-only phone check-in panel in the sibling portal.
The mobile projection reads existing dashboard data only and intentionally excludes full transcript and composer state.
